title: NCUA Credit Union Office
description: Schema for a federally insured credit union office as returned by the NCUA Credit Union Locator API.

AddressLongitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the office address.

AddressLatitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the office address.

CU_SITENAME.description: Name of this specific office or branch site.

CU_NUMBER.description: The NCUA charter number uniquely identifying this credit union.

City.description: City where the office is located.

Country.description: Country code for the office location.

IsMainOffice.description: Indicates whether this location is the credit union's main office.

SiteFunctions.description: Semicolon-delimited list of services at this office (e.g., Member Services;Drive Through;ATM).

SiteId.description: Unique identifier for this specific office site.

Zipcode.description: ZIP code for the office location.

distance.description: Distance in miles from the queried address. Negative values indicate N/A.
